title: YaeCCC Magnetic Stirrer Hot Plate Magnetic Mixer 1000ml Stir Plate Lab Stirrers
description:
78-1 Magnetic Stirrer,Scope:Widely used when liquid heating is needed in industry, agriculture, health and medicine, scientific research and college labs etc.
No noise, no vibration, electronic thermostat and stirring effect is remarkable
With single point and multi-point stirring at the same time, easy to operate
Smooth running, stepless speed control,turn on/off temperature control, in a wide speed range to have precise and stable mixing for liquid solution, especially for sample of small size
RELIABLE round plate for vessel holds up to 1000mL and comes with all parts needed to start mixing and heating samples immediately out of the box.
reviews_5s:
I’ve used this 100 times and still going strong
It’s a quality piece of equipmentWorks fine, just wish I had a control for the heat plate. It's either on or off.Without the ability to control the tempreture beyon On/Off it's difficult, even dangerous, to walk away from this while the hot plate's in use, but if you don't need to hold the formula at a constant temperature or you're not specific about the accent or cool down time it's a great product. Sable, strong stirring action and wide base allow for long slow stimulation and quick mixing alikeWas going to buy the nitecore mixer but glad I chose this one for its stronger motor. Mixed 240ml 100% vg blend in 500ml flask at highest speed. Takes around 15 minutes to get to the temperature sweet spot of 120-130°F. At that temp the vortex begins and I clip the heat off and slow speed a little to reduce splashing. Bought a digital thermometer to monitor temp. Very pleased with this mixer after mixing x4 240ml batches. Looks very well made and after a few uses i no longer needed to use the thermometer. I could tell just by the vortex how hot it was getting. Only complaint is that one of the rubber feet on the bottom was a little scuffed off and made the unit a tad unbalanced sitting on the table but for the price, a piece of electrical tape can fix that.For the price you have to say that this is worth the five stars. You probably won’t find another mixer/heater like this for $40 plus change. I use it in making perfumes. I don’t need something to get terribly hot. However, the other reviewer was right I got right around the same temp when I left it on for a hour. Also, I’m not trying to mix crazy thick stuff like VG/PG. However, it will turn a concrete into a liquid rather quickly (that’s if you know what you’re doing.) I think this item is exactly what it’s described as and nothing les or more.I was a bit skeptical about its quality and performance but was pleasantly surprised by how well it worked and easy it was to use. It is strong enough to create a vortex in liquid but gentle enough to stir my soup, yes I use it to heat and mix my soupI purchased this because I have been on and off making my vape juice and a buddy of mine was telling me about how he got a magnetic mixer, so I decided it would be a good idea to get one as well. This heating mixer is amazing, I can't thank the seller enough for working with me as well. I will gladly do business with Yae First Trading Co. again.I bought this for my grandson but my husband saw it and wanted one for his beer brewing! LOL Hubbie has stir plate envy!I needed a hot plate for the extra coffee pot. This is way cooler than the ordinary kitchen appliance style. I chose the lab style instead of a more kitchen appliance look on purpose. because nerd. The spin bar will come in handy for stirring punch etc.It's quite I love it
reviews_1s:
It stirs but the heating element is either ON or OFF no temp setting. It will either burn your stuff or not get it warm/hot enough. No Heat setting. The stir motor also makes noise cause the magnets connected to it are out of balance so the motor shouldnt last long because of the out of balance.So I don't care if I spend a little or a lot. If a product is sold in 2020 that has electrical components then the company should be aware of the dangers that come from bad wiring. Mine was working fine and next thing I know my office is on fire from the massive fire that started from the wires to the burner. One of them had completely melted through the plastic holding them in and in a second the spark lit papers and thank goodness I have a fire extinguisher next to my desk but if not. My kids my wife my inlaws were even here still because of the corona virus all were asleep!! This very very poor work of yours could have killed an entire family!! THIS PRODUCT NEEDS TO BE TAKEN OFF THE MARKET IMMEDIATELY!!!!!Device was shipped obviously dysfunctional.

Stirrer completely non-functioning, heating element and fuse ok for 1 minute then element burned up (fuse still intact!).

Device arrived within the box unbagged, packed loosely in a terrible mess of static-clung, broken styrofoam I had to clean up. There was a screw rolling around in the boxes debris that doesn't seem to go anywhere external, yet the device has a large object rating around inside.

Save the time and hassle, and avoid accepting another crappy replacement if you get a bum unit. They're mostly all garbage. Mine also was missing the spinner pills.The manufacturer claims the unit only heats to 98 degrees Celsius. Mine heats to 145 degrees Celsius, there is NO temperature control, it is just on/off. Do not buy this unit, spend more money and get one you can adjust. This is my second purchase from this vendor. They do not even support their own products. Both of my experiences with this vendor have been horrible.Never used the hot plate although it did work, but the stirrer stopped functioning after a few months of occasional use.Purchased to use to purify gold using aqua regia but Device doesn’t maintain enough heat to allow for acids to break down and dissolve gold. It does not heat anything up to a boiling point. Other than that, the magnet part works.The unit blew a fuse and started smoking when turned on after being plugged in. Caused the circuit breaker of my house to turn off the power. DO NOT BUY!Hot plate worked fine but I had to disassemble to get the magnet mechanisms to work. A time consuming hassleGot mine with no magnets or instructions, total waste.Wish it had temp in description an burner bigger
